title: Cardaria fenestrata
taxonomy: Cardaria fenestrata is classified as a species within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. It belongs to the genus Cardaria, which contains several species of annual or biennial plants. The family Brassicaceae is part of the larger clade called the Brassicales, an order of flowering plants. The clade Brassicales is further grouped within the superorder Rosanae, a clade of flowering plants. The superorder Rosanae is part of the larger clade called the Angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants.
